baseline_blockers.notes: Do not remediate during P0. Route into LCX8 action ledger and remediation lanes after inventory/trace.

runtime_notes.summary: The P1 DOM observation ran against Vite on port 5174 without the API server on port 4180. This is sufficient for visible control inventory but not for API-backed operational proof.
The S1 DOM observation ran with API 4180 and web 5174 online. It proves visibility and source/API traceability, while click side effects and API receipts remain P3/P4 scope.
Client DOM observation ran with API 4180 and web 5174 online. It proves visibility/source/API traceability, while click side effects and API receipts remain P3/P4 scope.

People/HRX remainder DOM observation ran with API 4180 and web 5174 online. It proves visible controls and source/API traceability, while click side effects, permission denials, step-up, audit rows, and read-back remain P3/P4 scope.
Profile DOM/click observation ran with web 5174 online. It proves visible controls, route/hash behavior, and no-op controls; no production/session/profile API runtime is claimed.

runtime_notes: P1-T10 desktop bridge inventory used local source trace, Node test receipts, and contract validators only. It does not prove packaged public release, OS protocol registration, live desktop click flow, or external runtime approval.
P5-T07 does not claim external receipts, public release, owner approval, production go-live, or native runtime packaging proof.
scope_note: P5-T06 confirmed 128 UI_ONLY rows as ephemeral/local-only route, component, form, query, or history state. No durable persistence proof is required for those rows; no statuses changed.
